title: Oodoc
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Oodoc |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]''[[The New Rebellion]]'' |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Spiked [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and backs |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Listen, toothpick brain. The roof's about to cave in. I would rather take my chances with whatever's out there than die with you in here.''"
"''I wouldn't.|Han Solo argues with an Oodoc|}} '''Oodocs''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known for their great size and strength but not their intelligence. They had spiked [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and backs and massive torsos. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], a number of Oodocs on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Skip 1]] were affected by the [[Almanian Uprising]], during which the [[Almania]]n dictator [[Kueller]] exploded [[Droid/Legends|droids]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to destabilize the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. ==Biology and appearance== The Oodocs were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] renowned for their large size and strength. They had massive chests, spikes across their [[Limb/Legends|arms]], and pointed spines up their backs.''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' Oodocs were commonly regarded as dim-witted. ==History== The Oodoc species was present in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] beyond their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] from at least [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], an [[Unidentified Oodoc patron|Oodoc]] was at the [[Crystal Jewel]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when explosions rocked the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] nearby. The shockwave threatened to collapse the ceiling of the casino, so many of the patrons tried to flee. However, the Oodoc pulled shut the door, believing it was safer to stay inside. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], a hero of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], was at the Crystal Jewel at the same time. Fearing the explosion might block escape from the underground casino, he shoved the Oodoc aside, shooting the door lock with his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. While the blaster bolt did break the lock, it also deflected into the back of the Oodoc. The large being tried to grab Solo but missed when the [[Human/Legends|Human]] was carried away in a tide of escaping patrons. A short time later that year, a number of Oodocs were present on [[Skip 1]], an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] located in [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]], an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] on the edge of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] that had harbored [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and other criminal elements for hundreds of years.{{InsiderCite|89|Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum and Villainy}} A number of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] detonated throughout the asteroid, injuring many sentients. Among them were several Oodocs who had their spikes blown off. These injured Oodocs were loaded aboard the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']]—a [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|pleasure yacht]] owned by the Human [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who was visiting the Run as part of an investigation for Han Solo—and flown out of the asteroid field to receive medical care. Those two explosions were linked: [[Kueller]], a dictator on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Almania]], had rigged explosives in hundreds of droids to kill [[Senator/Legends|senators]] on Coruscant as part of his plan to destabilize the New Republic and take control for himself. None of those Oodocs were intended targets; they were merely in the wrong place at the wrong time. ==Behind the scenes== The Oodoc species was created by [[Kristine Kathryn Rusch]] for her novel ''[[The New Rebellion]]'', published in [[1996]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Oodocs]] }}
